incident: Payment API returns HTTP 500 errors after deployment. Database latency increased to 3000ms. Redis cache unavailable.
expected_relationship: Database latency and Redis outage may contribute to Payment API failures.

incident: Corporate VPN unavailable. DNS resolution failures observed across multiple offices.
expected_relationship: DNS failures may contribute to VPN connectivity issues.

incident: Authentication service unavailable. Users report login failures. Identity Provider health checks failing.
expected_relationship: Identity Provider failure is likely related to authentication issues.
